calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-31-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 501 for Short Cause Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendants Jose Martinez and Madelyn Chacon.

Dept. 303; Judge Suzanne Ramos Bolanos; Clerk: K. Valdes and N. Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 11:50 a.m. and adjourning at 11:55 a.m. (D505)

Nils Rosenquest, appearing for David Wasserman, Attorney for Plaintiff Patricia Chu.
Defendant Jose Martinez is present and is assisted by Spanish Speaking Interpreter, Kenneth Wright; Certification #301672.
Defendant Madelyn Chacon is present and is assisted by Spanish Speaking Interpreter, Kenneth Wright; Certification #301672.

Parties stipulate into an agreement and are as follows:

Defendants shall vacate the premises located on 838 York Street, City and
County of San Francisco, CA 94110 on or before October 31, 2023.

Plaintiff Patricia Chu shall pay Defendants Jose Martinez and Madelyn Chacon for relocation expenses in the amount of $5,000.00. Plaintiff waives the right to rent and rental damages during the 60-day period.

The amount of $2,500.00, which is fifty percent (50%) of the relocation expenses, shall be paid within one (1) week from today to Defendant Jose Martinez and Defendant Madelyn Chacon to facilitate the move and the remaining amount of $2,500.00 shall be paid to the Defendants upon surrender of the premises on or before October 31, 2023.

If the Defendants fail to surrender the premises by October 31, 2023, Defendants will have 48-hour notice before the Plaintiff submits an ex-parte application for Default judgment for possession to the Court.

If the Defendants vacate the premises on or before October 31, 2023, the Plaintiff shall
dismiss the complaint against Defendants Martinez and Chacon with prejudice.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jul-24-2023 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2023 Off Calendar
